title: Post Catatonia
wikitext:
[]: Post Catatonia             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sun Jul 20, 2014 1:27 pm This must sound kinda of "ficshit", but I presume WILLE or whoever is going to risk their necks to keep an eye on Shinji (although he is catatonic) will be put on danger, because we don't know how Shinji will feel and act after he awakes from his catatonia... At least, I don't know. If he acts like before (his usual self) after awakening then humanity shall be fine (for a while), but *WARNING! THE FOLLOWING FICSHIT THEORY IS NOT RECOMMENDED TO THOSE WHO DON'T LIKE FICSHIT THEORIES! READ AT YOUR OWN RISK!* if some evil force, like an Angel or something take control of Shinji while he is catatonic or if he snaps into insanity, which is more probable, and try to escape from Wunder he might find an EVA (I don't believe the only EVAs around are just EVA 01, EVA 02, EVA 08 and Mk. 09 or 06) and starts to shredding some folks out there or even start another Impact just to take revenge under NERV, WILLE and every living human on Earth. This must sound absurd, but depending on Shinji mind health and will or how Anno's story twist will be, we must get another EoE ending or an happy ending or an bad ending or an doom saddening ending. Now, morally speaking without talking about Anno's intention, I think that when Shinji awakes from his catatonia, he will lose his few frail remains of sanity and he will commit a sequence of bestialities becuase he won't be capable to distinguish what is good and what is bad. If he was before...

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Jul 20, 2014 1:44 pm The thing is, that any theory needs some basis in what's gone before if it is to be part of the same work. For Shinji to behave like that would have no link whatever to his previous behaviour, or indeed to anything that we've seen up to now. While you might enjoy such a fic (or enjoy writing it), frankly I would not (as the link in my sig shows).

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Jul 20, 2014 3:09 pm @ Thomas As much as I would like to see Shinji just snap and totally wale on everything it's just not something he tends to do, in fact the only time he ever really commits violence is when people are in danger or are put into danger by people/Angels. Otherwise I believe he's a pacifist, he doesn't want to cause people pain. I don't think he'd raise his hand against the people he cares about. But if I think about it, he's only ever hit Touji and Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 20, 2014 4:11 pm There are just so many things wrong with that theory, not only psychologically (Shinji would never lash out on the world, since he's sure that he's the one who brought suffering and misery to it) but just physically: - "an Angel taking control of Shinji", which one, they're all dead? - "Shinji escaping from the Wunder", how? He's a scrawny 14 years old kid with barely combat training in the middle of a ship (or base if he's not transfered to the Wunder) full of grown-ups and trained soldiers, and even if somehow he got angelic powers, he'll probably get another DSS Choker or have EVA-08 ready to kick his ass, episode 24 style. - "Shinji finding an Eva", wat. Where the hell is he supposed to find one, I doubt there are abandoned Evas in functioning state in the middle of the desert, between the ruins of a building and an abandoned pick-up. And if he's in the Wunder, 02 is destroyed, 01 encased in a giant armored pod, and 08 certainly heavily guarded, and I'm sure WILLE would prefer to drop 08 in the sea or outright destroy it rather than letting Shinji hijack it. - "Shinji awakening his new Eva", simply put, he can't. An Eva needs to consume an Angel to reach the Awakened state, the best Shinji can do is put it in pseudo-evolved mode, and even with that not only he can't open the Door or Guf, but WILLE's Wunder and Unit 08 on one side and neo-NERV's awakened EVA-13, NS and MP-Evas on the other will be ready to destroy him if he tries something. TL;DR: That scenario is impossible.

[]:             Quote Post by xyz346 » Sun Jul 20, 2014 4:20 pm ^ This, pretty much. If Shinji was to actually do what Thomas suggests, then that would go against pretty much everything Shinji ever stood for. At the very end of 3.0, it's apparent that he feels really bad about everything he did. Having him go from that state to evil-doer would be terrible character development and not show any meaningful message. I don't see many fanfic attempts to actually make him do as Thomas suggests would be very successful. Typically, the authors of those kinds of fics in other fandoms end up turning the fic into a bash-fic against the characters they don't like.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sun Jul 20, 2014 5:14 pm @ ElMariachi I forgot the fact all Angels are extinguished in the third movie... I'm truly sorry for this mistake. But, I don't see how he would be caught in case of "possessing angelic powers" since he would, in fact, have powers that might surpass human capability and would be able (if he wanted to) get through all the soldiers. Anyway, I let a warning that it would be a fic-babble thread and this leaves me two questions: 1. What exactly would an Angel do with its powers? 2. Why the fuck didn't I posted this in the Evangelion Chit-Chat topics? And about "Shinji finding an Eva", that was just an opinion of mine. It's been a while since I last watched the movie and I don't remember somethings. Forgive the absurdities I wrote in my "theory". And pardon me all users that are reading this topic... This was created by plain curiosity. Now, about Shinji don't wanting to send the rest of the planet to the depths of hell... I created this theory because Shinji is a very emotional person and sometimes he lets his emotions control him. He will never forget the shit he have passed through and those memories will take control of his frail mind and sanity. Any person that would be in Shinji's shoes would snap and send everybody to hell or kill themselves. Why would it be different with Shinji? Some people would have the following thinking: "I doomed the majority of humanity and there's nothing I can do, but at the same time they expect me to do things right since I don't know shit what's going on and how it happened and they can't tell a damn thing... You know what? Fuck 'em all! If I try to do anything I'll just make my bad reputation even worse... So, why should I give a fuck? I'm already evil! Even if I manage to stop another disaster, I will eternally be remembered for my horrid actions... Nah, I'll not give them anymore reasons to try to kill me. Good luck for them, I'm out! " Or this thinking: "I doomed the majority of humanity and if I try to do something about this I'll just making things worse. I'm nothing but a murderer who obliterated almost all mankind because of my imprudent actions... Why I'm still living? And plus... If I don't kill myself, somebody will try kill me anyway..." Or also this: "Third Impact... EVAs... Mom in a EVA... Hatred... Everybody hates me... They don't tell me why... They won't tell me... Somebody set me up in this shit... Some motherfucker set this shit up! Father used me again! I'll kill him... I'll kill everybody... I'll doom this cursed planet to HELL!!! HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!!!" If Shinji flips them off or kill himself or slaughter the remaining living beings in Earth, it will be an selfish and wrong way to deal with things, but any normal human who spent 14 years trapped inside an EVA and discovers he unleashed Third Impact and those who gave him the news didn't even couldn't explain how this happened or what even happened in those 14 years because he was kidnapped to be convinced to pilot an EVA together with a unknown boy thinking he will solve his problems to later discover he almost caused another Impact and his father manipulated him would do one of the three thoughts above. Shinji don't want to hurt the ones he cares but his frail mind will haunt him with his actions and with the actions of other people and Shinji's patience dosen't last forever! Shinji like any other human will snap and do wrong things, becuase when humans are tormented mentally to the limit, they can become insane and do horrid actions without even caring if they are wrong or not. Yeah, Shinji might be someone who dosen't want to use violence, but he's not Mahatma Gandhi! Shinji is an human and as any other human he will lose his sanity and patience and do selfish things that will hurt others. I think he won't become ape shit because this isn't in the plot for the next movie. Anyway, thanks for answering!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 20, 2014 6:05 pm ^ To put it into perspective, the average Evangelion takes several countries worth of GDP to build and maintain, which is why there weren't more than fourteen built since Second Impact, of which two were "build" by just armoring a preexisting ADAM (Mark.06 and EVA-13) and one by "molding" a core into and Eva (Mark.09, we think, no one is sure WTF is exactly that thing), and that's why it's very unlikely that Shinji could find one conveniently abandoned in the middle of nowhere. The Nemesis Series and army of MP-Evas are the big unknown, especially since neo-NERV's local resources amounts of the floating ruins of the HQ and core material as far as the eye can see, unless core material can somehow be transmuted into any type of material desired, in which case SEELE/neo-NERV have at their disposable insane amounts of resources.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sun Jul 20, 2014 6:59 pm Thanks for the explanation, ElMariachi!

[]:             Quote Post by atarashiieva » Fri Jul 25, 2014 2:46 pm ElMariachi wrote: - "Shinji finding an Eva", wat. Where the hell is he supposed to find one, I doubt there are abandoned Evas in functioning state in the middle of the desert, between the ruins of a building and an abandoned pick-up. And if he's in the Wunder, 02 is destroyed, 01 encased in a giant armored pod, and 08 certainly heavily guarded, and I'm sure WILLE would prefer to drop 08 in the sea or outright destroy it rather than letting Shinji hijack it.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 25, 2014 5:33 pm I really doubt that Gendo will let an awakened Eva and two Spears lying around, especially since he said that Awakening it was part of his plan, and since he needed an Awakened Eva for his plans 14 years ago, it stands to reason that he still needs one at the time of Q. Besides I have a hard time picturing Shinji managing to go all the way back from the place he'll end to the ruins Tokyo-3 without being captured back by WILLE or neo-NERV or plainly dying from lack of supplies. As for EVA-01, well I don't know if Shinji will end piloting it again, but what I'm sure is that it won't passively serve as the Wunder's battery without having any role, we haven't heard the last of it.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jul 25, 2014 5:49 pm Perhaps Eva-01 will come to reject the Wunder as she rejected the dummy plug earlier. Given the ease with which she produced the devastating eye-beam at the start of Q , I'm sure that whatever Wille is using to keep her docile cannot be guaranteed if she decides to act.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jul 25, 2014 6:23 pm pwhodges wrote: I'm sure that whatever Wille is using to keep her docile cannot be guaranteed if she decides to act.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Fri Jul 25, 2014 6:31 pm And I'm pretty sure that WILLE will pull out deus ex machina that can effortlessly tame the berserker on their own ground. Why? As Anno's another dick-in-the face of fans, he will prove that not even godly Unit 01 - that fans love regardless of Shinji - is relevant anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jul 25, 2014 6:34 pm Stillborn wrote: And I'm pretty sure that WILLE will pull out deus ex machina that can effortlessly tame the berserker on their own ground. Why? As Anno's another dick-in-the face of fans, he will prove that not even godly Unit 01 - that fans love regardless of Shinji - is relevant anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Fri Jul 25, 2014 6:40 pm Probably with the same magitech that they made a giant turkey skeleton fly and turned Unit 01 into glorified car battery

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 25, 2014 7:22 pm ^ You mean like that anti-Angel collar that Kaworu, an Angel, could hack effortlessly? pwhodges wrote: Perhaps Eva-01 will come to reject the Wunder as she rejected the dummy plug earlier. Given the ease with which she produced the devastating eye-beam at the start of Q , I'm sure that whatever Wille is using to keep her docile cannot be guaranteed if she decides to act.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sat Jul 26, 2014 9:05 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ You mean like that anti-Angel collar that Kaworu, an Angel, could hack effortlessly?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 26, 2014 9:56 am ^ That's a possibility, Kaworu knew that he had to die to stop Fourth Impact, and I just can't believe that the ten minute charging time before detonating is a standard feature of the DSS Choker. So it's possible that he used his powers to block the detonation (the red "crystal" things around his neck) long enough for him to give his parting words to Shinji, then stopped his power, letting the Choker kill him.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sat Jul 26, 2014 10:03 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ That's a possibility, Kaworu knew that he had to die to stop Fourth Impact, and I just can't believe that the ten minute charging time before detonating is a standard feature of the DSS Choker. So it's possible that he used his powers to block the detonation (the red "crystal" things around his neck) long enough for him to give his parting words to Shinji, then stopped his power, letting the Choker kill him.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 26, 2014 11:12 am ^ Well, that was the whole of Shinji descending into catatonia in the first place: the guilt to be the one responsible for Kaworu's death with his recklessness. And Kaworu even warned him beforehand: when he took the DSS Choker from Shinji, he said that it is so he'll will shoulder the risk of the Awakening.
